title: Improved Potions
description: Not the biggest project, the main goal of which is to improve the mechanics of brewing potions in the game. New tools, items, potions, and cauldron brewing.
body:
The mechanics of brewing potions in the Brewing Stand are quite boring. At the same time, most players do not know the recipes for even common potions. This is why this mechanic works quite poorly in Minecraft. Improved Potions completely fixes all potion brewing flaws!

**Official video review:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PKVmrelAGps" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Main changes and innovations
- All potions are now brewed in a cauldron.
- To work with a cauldron, you need to boil water in it.
- All potions can now have up to 3 effects (depending on the ones you choose).
- Using a pestle and a small cauldron, you need to create some components.
- Along with regular potions, there are also special ones that are not at all like vanilla ones.

You can find out all the information from a special book that drops from the witch and can be purchased from the priest in the village. Along with this, the project has its own [WIKIpedia](https://bigsty.github.io/PotionWIKI/index.html) with all the details.

**THE ENTIRE DATAPACK HAS BEEN TRANSLATED INTO 3 LANGUAGES**: English, Ukrainian, Russian. Translation works depending on the selected language in the game. At the same time, the project does **NOT NEED Optifine** or other mods.
